type="text/css">@font-face { font-family: Roboto; src: url('chrome-extension://gdojjgflncpbcfmenbkndfhoamlhajmf/fonts/Roboto-Regular.ttf'); }</style><link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Roboto:500" type="text/css" rel="stylesheet"><style id="balsamiq-styles">
    @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Indie+Flower&display=swap');
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-button {
      all: unset;
      font-family: 'Indie Flower', cursive !important;
      background: #fff !important;
      border: 1px solid #000 !important;
      border-radius: 0.6em !important;
      box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.2) !important;
      padding: 0.05em 0.2em !important;
      transform: rotate(-1deg);
      color: #131313 !important;
      user-select: none;
      cursor: default;
      touch-action: none;
      will-change: transform;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 1.8em;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-input {
      all: unset;
      box-sizing: border-box;
      font-family: 'Indie Flower', cursive !important;
      font-size: 1.1em;
      background: #fff !important;
      border: none !important;
      box-shadow: none !important;
      padding: 0.4em 0.6em !important;
      transform: rotate(-1deg);
      color: #131313 !important;
      touch-action: none;
      will-change: transform;
      height: 95% !important;
      width: 95% !important;
      user-select: none;
      cursor: default;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer input[type="checkbox"],
    #uiMockupContainer input[type="radio"] {
      pointer-events:none;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .input-wrapper {
      box-sizing: border-box;
      font-family: 'Indie Flower', cursive !important;
      font-size: 1.1em;
      background: #fff !important;
      border: 1px solid #000 !important;
      border-radius: 0 !important;
      box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.2) !important;
      transform: rotate(-1deg);
      color: #131313 !important;
      user-select: none;
      cursor: default;
      touch-action: none;
      will-change: transform;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 0.2em 0.3em;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-frame {
      box-sizing: border-box;
      position: absolute;
      background: transparent !important;
      border: 2px solid #3a3a3a;
      mix-blend-mode: normal;
      z-index: -1;
      touch-action: none;
      will-change: transform;
      user-select: none;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .selected {
      outline: 2px dashed lightblue;
      cursor: move;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-box {
      box-sizing: border-box;
      position: absolute;
      background: #fff;
      border: none;
      z-index: -1;
      touch-action: none;
      will-change: transform;
      user-select: none;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-header {
      box-sizing: border-box;
      display: inline-block !important;
      font-family: 'Indie Flower', cursive !important;
      font-weight: bold !important;
      font-size: 2rem;
      background: transparent !important;
      user-select: none;
      cursor: default;
      touch-action: none;
      will-change: transform;
      position: absolute;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-text {
      box-sizing: border-box;
      display: inline-block !important;
      font-family: 'Indie Flower', cursive !important;
      font-weight: normal !important;
      font-size: 1.75rem;
      background: transparent !important;
      user-select: none;
      cursor: default;
      touch-action: none;
      will-change: transform;
      position: absolute;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-divider {
      position: absolute;
      width: 100px;
      height: 2px;
      background: #3a3a3a;
      mix-blend-mode: normal;
      user-select: none;
      cursor: ew-resize;
      touch-action: none;
      box-sizing: content-box !important;
      padding: 4px 0;
      background-clip: content-box;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-divider.vertical {
      width: 2px;
      height: 100px;
      background: #3a3a3a;
      mix-blend-mode: normal;
      user-select: none;
      cursor: ns-resize;
      touch-action: none;
      box-sizing: content-box !important;
      padding: 0 4px;
      background-clip: content-box;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .divider-toggle {
      position: absolute;
      top: -16px;
      right: -4px;
      width: 16px;
      height: 16px;
      background: #fff;
      border: 1px solid #000;
      border-radius: 50%;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      cursor: pointer;
      touch-action: none;
      font-size: 12px;
      user-select: none;
      z-index: 2147483646;
      box-shadow: 1px 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-checkbox,
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-radio {
      box-sizing: border-box;
      position: absolute;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center !important;
      gap: 8px;
      font-family: 'Indie Flower', cursive !important;
      font-size: 1em;
      user-select: none;
      cursor: default;
      touch-action: none;
      will-change: transform;
      white-space: nowrap;
      overflow: visible;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-checkbox input,
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-radio input {
      all: unset;
      appearance: none;
      width: 22px;
      height: 22px;
      margin: 0;
      background: #fff !important;
      border: 2px solid #000 !important;
      box-sizing: border-box;
      flex: 0 0 22px !important;
      margin-right: 8px;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-checkbox span,
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-radio span {
      overflow: visible !important;
      text-overflow: clip !important;
      max-width: none !important;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-radio input {
      border-radius: 50%;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-radio input:checked {
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%,#000 0 40%,transparent 41%) !important;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-checkbox.selected,
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-radio.selected {
      overflow: visible !important;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-checkbox input,
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-radio input {
      flex-shrink: 0;
      align-self: center !important;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-checkbox input::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      width: 6px;
      height: 12px;
      left: 6px;
      border: 3px solid #000;
      border-top: none;
      border-left: none;
      transform: rotate(45deg);
      opacity: 0;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-checkbox input:checked::after {
      opacity: 1;
    }
/* --- crossed frame ------------------------------- */
    #uiMockupContainer .frame-cross-line{
      position:absolute;
      width:100%;  
      height:2px;
      background:#3a3a3a;
      mix-blend-mode: normal;
      pointer-events:none;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .line-diag-1{ top:0;    left:0; transform-origin:left top;    }
    #uiMockupContainer .line-diag-2{ bottom:0; left:0; transform-origin:left bottom; }

Start of headEnd -->
    
    <!-- End of headEnd -->
<style>
#__framer-editorbar-container {
    align-items: center;
    display: flex;
    gap: 8px;
    position: fixed;
    z-index: calc(2147483647);
    width: max-content;
    cursor: pointer;
}

#__framer-editorbar-label {
    background-color: #111;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-family: "Inter", "Inter-Regular", system-ui, Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    height: fit-content;
    opacity: 0;
    padding: 4px 8px;
    transition: opacity 0.4s ease-out;
    font-weight: 500;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    position: fixed;
    width: max-content;
    pointer-events: none;
    user-select: none;
}

#__framer-editorbar-button {
    all: unset;
    align-items: center;
    border-radius: 15px;
    display: flex;
    height: 30px;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 30px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

#__framer-editorbar-label.__framer-editorbar-button-tooltip-visible {
    opacity: 1;
}

#__framer-editorbar-label, #__framer-editorbar-button {
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    background-color: rgba(34, 34, 34, 0.8);
    box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 2px 4px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) 0px 1px 0px 0px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15) 0px 0px 0px 1px;
    color: #fff;
}

#__framer-editorbar-loading-spinner {
    width: 12px;
    height: 12px;
    -webkit-mask: url(data:image/png;base64,);
    mask: url(data:image/png;base64,);
    -webkit-mask-size: 12px;
    mask-size: 12px;
    background-color: #fff;


    animation-duration: 800ms;
    animation-iteration-count: infinite;
    animation-name: __framer-loading-spin;
    animation-timing-function: linear;
}

@keyframes __framer-loading-spin {
    0% {
        transform: rotate(0deg);
    }

    100% {
        transform: rotate(360deg);
    }
}
</style><style>
#__framer-editorbar {
    /* https://sergeyski.com/css-color-scheme-and-iframes-lessons-learned-from-disqus-background-bug */
    color-scheme: light dark;
    overflow: hidden;
    position: fixed;
    border: none;
    z-index: calc(2147483647);
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100vw;
    height: 100vh;
    touch-action: manipulation;
}

@supports (height: 100dvh) {
    #__framer-editorbar {
        height: 100dvh;
    }
}

#__framer-editorbar.status_hidden {
    display: none;
}

#__framer-editorbar.status_visually_hidden {
    clip-path: circle(1px at calc(100% - 1px) calc(100% - 1px));
    z-index: calc(2147483647 - 1);
}

#__framer-editorbar.status_measuring {
    clip-path: unset;
}
</style><style type="text/css">@font-face { font-family: Roboto; src: url('chrome-extension://gdojjgflncpbcfmenbkndfhoamlhajmf/fonts/Roboto-Regular.ttf'); }</style><link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Roboto:500" type="text/css" rel="stylesheet"><style id="balsamiq-styles">
    @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Indie+Flower&display=swap');
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-button {
      all: unset;
      font-family: 'Indie Flower', cursive !important;
      background: #fff !important;
      border: 1px solid #000 !important;
      border-radius: 0.6em !important;
      box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.2) !important;
      padding: 0.05em 0.2em !important;
      transform: rotate(-1deg);
      color: #131313 !important;
      user-select: none;
      cursor: default;
      touch-action: none;
      will-change: transform;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 1.8em;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-input {
      all: unset;
      box-sizing: border-box;
      font-family: 'Indie Flower', cursive !important;
      font-size: 1.1em;
      background: #fff !important;
      border: none !important;
      box-shadow: none !important;
      padding: 0.4em 0.6em !important;
      transform: rotate(-1deg);
      color: #131313 !important;
      touch-action: none;
      will-change: transform;
      height: 95% !important;
      width: 95% !important;
      user-select: none;
      cursor: default;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer input[type="checkbox"],
    #uiMockupContainer input[type="radio"] {
      pointer-events:none;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .input-wrapper {
      box-sizing: border-box;
      font-family: 'Indie Flower', cursive !important;
      font-size: 1.1em;
      background: #fff !important;
      border: 1px solid #000 !important;
      border-radius: 0 !important;
      box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.2) !important;
      transform: rotate(-1deg);
      color: #131313 !important;
      user-select: none;
      cursor: default;
      touch-action: none;
      will-change: transform;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 0.2em 0.3em;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-frame {
      box-sizing: border-box;
      position: absolute;
      background: transparent !important;
      border: 2px solid #3a3a3a;
      mix-blend-mode: normal;
      z-index: -1;
      touch-action: none;
      will-change: transform;
      user-select: none;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .selected {
      outline: 2px dashed lightblue;
      cursor: move;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-box {
      box-sizing: border-box;
      position: absolute;
      background: #fff;
      border: none;
      z-index: -1;
      touch-action: none;
      will-change: transform;
      user-select: none;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-header {
      box-sizing: border-box;
      display: inline-block !important;
      font-family: 'Indie Flower', cursive !important;
      font-weight: bold !important;
      font-size: 2rem;
      background: transparent !important;
      user-select: none;
      cursor: default;
      touch-action: none;
      will-change: transform;
      position: absolute;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-text {
      box-sizing: border-box;
      display: inline-block !important;
      font-family: 'Indie Flower', cursive !important;
      font-weight: normal !important;
      font-size: 1.75rem;
      background: transparent !important;
      user-select: none;
      cursor: default;
      touch-action: none;
      will-change: transform;
      position: absolute;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-divider {
      position: absolute;
      width: 100px;
      height: 2px;
      background: #3a3a3a;
      mix-blend-mode: normal;
      user-select: none;
      cursor: ew-resize;
      touch-action: none;
      box-sizing: content-box !important;
      padding: 4px 0;
      background-clip: content-box;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-divider.vertical {
      width: 2px;
      height: 100px;
      background: #3a3a3a;
      mix-blend-mode: normal;
      user-select: none;
      cursor: ns-resize;
      touch-action: none;
      box-sizing: content-box !important;
      padding: 0 4px;
      background-clip: content-box;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .divider-toggle {
      position: absolute;
      top: -16px;
      right: -4px;
      width: 16px;
      height: 16px;
      background: #fff;
      border: 1px solid #000;
      border-radius: 50%;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      cursor: pointer;
      touch-action: none;
      font-size: 12px;
      user-select: none;
      z-index: 2147483646;
      box-shadow: 1px 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-checkbox,
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-radio {
      box-sizing: border-box;
      position: absolute;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center !important;
      gap: 8px;
      font-family: 'Indie Flower', cursive !important;
      font-size: 1em;
      user-select: none;
      cursor: default;
      touch-action: none;
      will-change: transform;
      white-space: nowrap;
      overflow: visible;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-checkbox input,
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-radio input {
      all: unset;
      appearance: none;
      width: 22px;
      height: 22px;
      margin: 0;
      background: #fff !important;
      border: 2px solid #000 !important;
      box-sizing: border-box;
      flex: 0 0 22px !important;
      margin-right: 8px;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-checkbox span,
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-radio span {
      overflow: visible !important;
      text-overflow: clip !important;
      max-width: none !important;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-radio input {
      border-radius: 50%;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-radio input:checked {
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%,#000 0 40%,transparent 41%) !important;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-checkbox.selected,
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-radio.selected {
      overflow: visible !important;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-checkbox input,
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-radio input {
      flex-shrink: 0;
      align-self: center !important;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-checkbox input::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      width: 6px;
      height: 12px;
      left: 6px;
      border: 3px solid #000;
      border-top: none;
      border-left: none;
      transform: rotate(45deg);
      opacity: 0;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .balsamiq-checkbox input:checked::after {
      opacity: 1;
    }
/* --- crossed frame ------------------------------- */
    #uiMockupContainer .frame-cross-line{
      position:absolute;
      width:100%;  
      height:2px;
      background:#3a3a3a;
      mix-blend-mode: normal;
      pointer-events:none;
    }
    #uiMockupContainer .line-diag-1{ top:0;    left:0; transform-origin:left top;    }
    #uiMockupContainer .line-diag-2{ bottom:0; left:0; transform-origin:left bottom; }

  </style></head>
